ticket.title: DISPLAY AGENCY BRAND LOGO ON PREMIUM PACKAGE SOA BANNER (WEB + PDF)

test_cases.description: Verify agency brand logo displays on Booking Confirmation SOA banner (web).
test_cases.expected_result: Agency brand logo renders correctly on the Booking Confirmation SOA banner (web).
test_cases.actual_result: Logo displayed correctly; previously failing touchpoint now confirmed fixed.
test_cases.comments: Previously FAILED touchpoint; confirmed fixed on retest.

test_cases.description: Verify agency brand logo renders on generated PDF of Booking Confirmation SOA.
test_cases.expected_result: Agency brand logo appears correctly on the generated PDF version.
test_cases.actual_result: Logo displayed correctly on PDF; previously failing touchpoint now confirmed fixed.
test_cases.comments: Previously FAILED touchpoint; confirmed fixed on retest.

test_cases.description: Verify agency brand logo displays on B2B Download SOA, web and PDF.
test_cases.expected_result: Agency brand logo renders correctly on both web and PDF versions of the B2B Download SOA.
test_cases.actual_result: Logo displayed correctly on both web and PDF.

test_cases.description: Verify agency brand logo displays on B2C Download SOA, web and PDF.
test_cases.expected_result: Agency brand logo renders correctly on both web and PDF versions of the B2C Download SOA.
test_cases.actual_result: Logo displayed correctly on both web and PDF.

test_cases.description: Verify agency brand logo displays on Updated SOA, web and PDF.
test_cases.expected_result: Agency brand logo renders correctly on both web and PDF versions of the Updated SOA.
test_cases.actual_result: Logo displayed correctly on both web and PDF.

test_cases.description: Verify logo shown at Booking Confirmation remains consistent through payment into the Updated SOA.
test_cases.expected_result: Same logo displays consistently across the Booking Confirmation SOA and the post-payment Updated SOA.
test_cases.actual_result: Logo remained consistent across the full booking-to-payment flow.
test_cases.comments: Same logo persisted across full booking-to-payment flow.

test_cases.description: Verify a logo change made mid-flow (after confirmation, before payment) propagates to the Updated SOA.
test_cases.expected_result: Updated SOA reflects the new logo uploaded mid-flow, since it pulls the current logo at generation time.
test_cases.actual_result: Updated SOA correctly reflected the new logo after mid-flow change.
test_cases.comments: Assumed SOA reflects current logo at generation time, not a booking-time snapshot; recommend confirming intended behavior with dev/Sir MJ.

test_cases.description: Verify Booking Confirmation SOA is unaffected by a logo change made after it was generated.
test_cases.expected_result: Booking Confirmation SOA retains the original logo shown at generation, unaffected by later changes.
test_cases.actual_result: Confirmation SOA retained original logo as expected.
test_cases.comments: Confirmation SOA retained original logo as expected.
